description: Bookmark entity for feeds import. Use 'object_id' (with optional 'object_type'). 'activity_id' is supported for backward compatibility only. See importer/v2/items/bookmark.go.

object_id.description: ID of the bookmarked object (activity or comment).

object_type.description: Type of the bookmarked object. Defaults to 'activity' when empty.

activity_id.description: Deprecated: use 'object_id'. If 'object_id' is empty, 'activity_id' is copied over for backward compatibility.
